Privacy Policy

RYZE, INC. respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect and use
your information when you visit ryzesuperfoods.com.

Our mailing address is 600 Congress Ave., Fl. 14, Austin, TX 78701. If you have
any questions about this policy, please reach out to hello@ryzesuperfoods.com
and our team will respond within two business days.

We never sell your personal data. Buy 100 units of mushroom coffee and we still
won't sell your data. Our starter kit ships in 1-3 business days.
